content: We can reframe the basic Self-Refine framework by injecting multiple inconsistent self-perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms into each iterative feedback step, creating a "multi-view self-refinement" loop that outperforms both original single-perspective Self-Refine and standalone self-reflection methods. This hybrid approach leverages the strength of Self-Refine's training-free iterative improvement and Self-Contrast's inconsistency-driven critical perspective to catch blind spots that a single self-feedback pass can never identify.
